description.zh: 通过交互式星图、学习路径和真实案例，像探索星空一样学习股票知识。1200+概念、300+关联、26K+学习者。
description.en: Learn stock market knowledge through interactive star maps, learning paths, and real-world cases. 1200+ concepts, 300+ links, 26K+ learners.

description.zh: 免费在线小游戏合集，包含扫雷、纸牌接龙、贪吃蛇、俄罗斯方块、象棋等20+款经典游戏。单HTML文件，无需下载，离线可玩。
description.en: Free online classic games collection including Minesweeper, Solitaire, Snake, Tetris, Chess and 20+ more. Single HTML files, no download needed, playable offline.

description.zh: 18个免费在线投资计算器，涵盖市盈率、PEG、ROE杜邦分析、股息率、复利、仓位管理、DCF估值等。无需注册。
description.en: 18 free online calculators for stock valuation, risk, and returns analysis. Includes PE ratio, PEG, ROE DuPont, dividend yield, DCF valuation and more.

description.zh: 发现最佳 AI Agent 技能，100+ AI 技能指南，帮助你构建更智能的 AI 应用。
description.en: Discover best AI Agent skills. 100+ AI skills guide to help you build smarter AI applications.

description.zh: 系统化编程课程平台，每门课程100课时。涵盖数据结构、Docker、Go、Kubernetes、Linux、机器学习、Python、Rust等。
description.en: Systematic programming courses, 100 lessons each. Covers Data Structures, Docker, Go, Kubernetes, Linux, ML, Python, Rust and more.

description.zh: 基于网易云音乐接口的在线音乐播放器，免费畅听海量歌曲。
description.en: Online music player powered by NetEase Cloud Music API. Free access to millions of songs.

description.zh: OmniDev AI 平台文档，包含全功能 AI 开发平台（IDE、Agent、RAG、工作流、部署）和可插拔知识库引擎的详细指南。
description.en: OmniDev AI platform documentation. Comprehensive docs for the all-in-one AI development platform and pluggable knowledge engine for RAG applications.

description.zh: AI 对话应用，与智能助手进行自然语言交互。
description.en: AI chat application for natural language interaction with intelligent assistants.
